headline: Why Best Buy’s (BBY) Dividend and Buyback Mix Puts It in the Middle of the Tax-Efficiency Spectrum
summary: Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) is one of the dividend stocks picked by financial media as investors ask whether dividend stocks are tax-efficient. On May 28, Best Buy reported Q1 FY27 results and said it returned $202 million to shareholders through dividends during the quarter. The company also said its board authorized a regular quarterly […]

headline: Best Buy (BBY) Rolls Out RGB LED TVs, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Why Best Buy’s RGB LED TV Launch Matters for the Stock Best Buy (BBY) has rolled out RGB LED TVs across nearly all its stores, supported by exclusive partnerships with major TV brands and extensive staff training, creating a differentiated in-store and online offering. For investors watching Best Buy stock, this product launch is tied to a category where millions of households periodically replace TVs, and it comes with integrated services such as free delivery, installation and haul away on...

headline: Best Buy (BBY) Stock Still Trades At A Discount On Earnings
summary: Best Buy stock has delivered a 15.0% return over the past year, yet its valuation checks still suggest the shares lean cheap rather than fully priced in. With the stock recently closing at US$78.72, investors are weighing how much of that performance is already reflected in the current multiples. Over the last 1 year, Best Buy has returned 15.0%, which puts a spotlight on whether the recent gain is supported by fundamentals. For Best Buy, expectations around how reliably it can convert sales...

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 We Question
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: What Best Buy (BBY)'s Exclusive RGB LED TV Rollout Means For Shareholders
summary: In June 2026, Best Buy introduced RGB LED TVs nationwide through exclusive partnerships with Samsung, Sony, LG, TCL and Hisense, offering free delivery, installation and haul-away with most purchases and showcasing screen sizes from 50 inches up to 116 inches. This rollout positions Best Buy as the only national retailer where shoppers can experience this new RGB LED standard in person, supported by more than 15,000 specially trained Blue Shirts to guide complex home theater upgrade...
